nameMeanings.name: von
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Cambodian: written វ៉ុន, unexplained.

variants.name: Vaughan
meanings: Welsh: from fychan, a lenited form of bychan, a diminutive of bach ‘little’. This was often used to distinguish the younger of two bearers of the same personal name, typically the son of a father with the same name.

nameMeanings.name: Otto
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a short form of any of the various Germanic compound personal names containing the element od, ot ‘prosperity, wealth’ ( compare the corresponding Old English ēad in names such as Edward and Edwin ). St Otto of Bamberg ( d. 1139 ) was a missionary to the Pomeranians. Otto the Great ( 912–73 ) is generally regarded as the founder of the Holy Roman Empire, and the name has been borne by several members of German and Austrian royal houses. It was recorded occasionally among immigrants to England from the Low Countries in the 14th century, but failed to establish itself. Since the 19th century it has again been used occasionally in the English-speaking world, mostly among immigrants from Germanic countries.

nameMeanings.name: II
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.

en.lifeSummary: When Graf Otto II von Ravensburg was born in 1195, in Ravensburg, Württemberg, Germany, his father, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, was 55 and his mother, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, was 39. He had at least 1 son and 2 daughters with Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen. He died on 1 April 1244, at the age of 49.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Graf Otto II von Ravensburg est né en 1195, à Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Allemagne, son père, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, avait 55 ans et sa mère, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, avait 39 ans. Il a eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles avec Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen. Il est décédé le 1 avril 1244, à l’âge de 49 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Graf Otto II von Ravensburg 1195 in Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Deutschland geboren wurde, war sein Vater Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII 55 und seine Mutter Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria 39. Er hatte mit Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb am 1. April 1244 im Alter von 49 Jahren.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Graf Otto II von Ravensburg è nato il nel 1195 nel Oberamt Ravensburg, Württemberg, Germania, il suo padre, Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII, aveva 55 anni e il suo madre, Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, aveva 39 anni. Lui avuto almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie con Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen. Morì il 1 aprile 1244, all'età di 49 anni.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Graf Otto II von Ravensburg родился в 1195 г. в местности обирамт равенсбург, вuрттембирг, Германия, его отцу по имени Poppo Count Of Henneberg XII было 55 лет, а матери, которую звали Sophia Von Andechs Of Bavaria, 39. У него был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери от Sophia von Oldenburg-Wildeshausen. Он умер 1 апреля 1244 г. в возрасте 49 лет.
